channel.title: System Design on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in System Design on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: 6sense: From Hackathons to AI Pipelines
item.description: A 4.5-year journey scaling frontend architectures, merging acquisitions, building big data pipelines, and shipping Generative AI infrastructure.

item.title: AI Email Writer — LLM-Powered Outbound at Scale
item.description: Built an LLM email generation system processing 1,500+ emails daily with multi-layer guardrails, achieving 42% reply rates.
